strInstructions:
Step 1: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices.
Step 2: Cook rice until half done.
Step 3: Layer rice and chicken in a pot.
Step 4: Cook on low heat for 20 minutes.
Step 5: Garnish with fried onions and serve.

Step 1: Marinate chicken in lemon juice and spices.
Step 2: Grill or pan-fry until charred.
Step 3: Prepare tomato gravy with butter and cream.
Step 4: Add chicken to gravy and simmer.
Step 5: Serve with naan or rice.

Step 1: Cook ground beef with taco seasoning.
Step 2: Warm tortillas.
Step 3: Fill tortillas with beef, lettuce, cheese, and salsa.
Step 4: Serve with lime wedges.

Step 1: Cook spaghetti until al dente.
Step 2: Fry pancetta until crispy.
Step 3: Whisk eggs, cheese, and pepper.
Step 4: Toss hot pasta with egg mixture and pancetta.
Step 5: Serve immediately with extra cheese.

Step 1: Cook sushi rice and season with vinegar.
Step 2: Place nori on bamboo mat.
Step 3: Spread rice, add fillings (fish, avocado).
Step 4: Roll tightly and slice.
Step 5: Serve with soy sauce and wasabi.

Step 1: Soak rice noodles in warm water.
Step 2: Stir-fry tofu or shrimp with garlic.
Step 3: Add noodles, egg, and sauce.
Step 4: Toss with bean sprouts and peanuts.
Step 5: Serve with lime and chili flakes.

Step 1: Make pizza dough and let rise.
Step 2: Roll out and top with tomato sauce.
Step 3: Add mozzarella and basil leaves.
Step 4: Bake at 250°C until crust is golden.
Step 5: Drizzle with olive oil and serve.

Step 1: Cut fish into fillets.
Step 2: Make batter with flour and beer.
Step 3: Deep-fry fish until golden.
Step 4: Fry chips (fries) until crispy.
Step 5: Serve with tartar sauce and lemon.

Step 1: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
Step 2: Grill until charred.
Step 3: Make creamy tomato sauce.
Step 4: Add chicken to sauce and simmer.
Step 5: Serve with rice or naan.

Step 1: Chop romaine lettuce.
Step 2: Make dressing with anchovy, garlic, and lemon.
Step 3: Toss lettuce with dressing and croutons.
Step 4: Top with parmesan shavings.
Step 5: Serve chilled.

Step 1: Slice beef into strips.
Step 2: Sauté onions and mushrooms.
Step 3: Brown beef and add broth.
Step 4: Stir in sour cream and mustard.
Step 5: Serve over egg noodles.

Step 1: Sauté mushrooms and garlic.
Step 2: Toast rice in butter.
Step 3: Add wine and simmer.
Step 4: Gradually add broth while stirring.
Step 5: Finish with parmesan and parsley.

Step 1: Cook rice and cool.
Step 2: Stir-fry chicken with garlic.
Step 3: Add vegetables and rice.
Step 4: Season with soy sauce.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Sauté onion, garlic, and bell pepper.
Step 2: Add rice and paprika.
Step 3: Pour broth and add saffron.
Step 4: Arrange seafood and chicken on top.
Step 5: Cook until rice is tender and liquid absorbed.

Step 1: Cook pasta according to package.
Step 2: Sauté shrimp in butter and garlic.
Step 3: Add white wine and lemon juice.
Step 4: Toss with pasta and parsley.
Step 5: Serve with grated cheese.

Step 1: Cook lasagna noodles.
Step 2: Prepare tomato and cheese sauce.
Step 3: Layer noodles, vegetables, and sauce.
Step 4: Top with mozzarella.
Step 5: Bake until bubbly and golden.

Step 1: Boil chicken with vegetables.
Step 2: Shred chicken and strain broth.
Step 3: Add noodles and cook.
Step 4: Return chicken to pot.
Step 5: Season with herbs and serve.

Step 1: Form ground beef into patties.
Step 2: Season with salt and pepper.
Step 3: Grill or pan-fry to desired doneness.
Step 4: Toast buns and assemble with toppings.
Step 5: Serve with fries.

Step 1: Boil broth with lemongrass and lime leaves.
Step 2: Add shrimp and mushrooms.
Step 3: Season with fish sauce and chili.
Step 4: Add lime juice and cilantro.
Step 5: Serve hot.

Step 1: Caramelize onions in butter.
Step 2: Add beef broth and thyme.
Step 3: Simmer for 20 minutes.
Step 4: Ladle into bowls and top with bread and cheese.
Step 5: Broil until cheese is melted.

Step 1: Pound chicken breasts.
Step 2: Bread with flour, egg, and breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Fry until golden.
Step 4: Top with marinara and mozzarella.
Step 5: Bake until cheese melts.

Step 1: Heat dashi broth.
Step 2: Dissolve miso paste.
Step 3: Add tofu and seaweed.
Step 4: Simmer gently.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Brown lamb pieces.
Step 2: Sauté onions, ginger, garlic.
Step 3: Add spices and tomatoes.
Step 4: Simmer with yoghurt.
Step 5: Cook until meat is tender.

Step 1: Soak chickpeas overnight.
Step 2: Grind with herbs and spices.
Step 3: Form into balls.
Step 4: Deep-fry until golden.
Step 5: Serve with pita and tahini.

Step 1: Sear beef fillet.
Step 2: Cover with mushroom duxelles.
Step 3: Wrap in puff pastry.
Step 4: Brush with egg wash.
Step 5: Bake until pastry is golden.

Step 1: Cook noodles and drain.
Step 2: Stir-fry chicken and vegetables.
Step 3: Add noodles and soy sauce.
Step 4: Toss well and heat through.
Step 5: Garnish with sesame seeds.

Step 1: Cook ziti pasta.
Step 2: Mix with marinara and ricotta.
Step 3: Transfer to baking dish.
Step 4: Top with mozzarella.
Step 5: Bake until bubbly.

Step 1: Season pork chops.
Step 2: Pan-fry until cooked through.
Step 3: Make applesauce with apples and sugar.
Step 4: Serve chops with applesauce.
Step 5: Garnish with thyme.

Step 1: Marinate chicken in soy sauce.
Step 2: Stir-fry chicken until cooked.
Step 3: Add peanuts and chili peppers.
Step 4: Toss in sauce.
Step 5: Serve with rice.

Step 1: Slice vegetables thinly.
Step 2: Layer in baking dish.
Step 3: Drizzle with olive oil and herbs.
Step 4: Bake until tender.
Step 5: Serve with bread.

Step 1: Cook bacon and set aside.
Step 2: Sauté onions and celery.
Step 3: Add potatoes, broth, and clams.
Step 4: Stir in cream and season.
Step 5: Serve with oyster crackers.

Step 1: Cook and shred chicken.
Step 2: Fill tortillas with chicken and cheese.
Step 3: Roll and place in baking dish.
Step 4: Top with enchilada sauce and cheese.
Step 5: Bake until bubbly.

Step 1: Chop tomatoes, cucumber, and onion.
Step 2: Add olives and feta cheese.
Step 3: Dress with olive oil and oregano.
Step 4: Toss and serve chilled.

Step 1: Season and cook ground beef.
Step 2: Warm taco shells.
Step 3: Fill with beef, lettuce, tomato, and cheese.
Step 4: Add salsa and sour cream.
Step 5: Serve with lime wedges.

Step 1: Make teriyaki sauce with soy, mirin, and sugar.
Step 2: Marinate chicken.
Step 3: Grill or pan-fry chicken.
Step 4: Glaze with sauce.
Step 5: Serve with rice and vegetables.

Step 1: Cook lasagna noodles.
Step 2: Prepare meat sauce and béchamel.
Step 3: Layer noodles, sauce, and cheese.
Step 4: Bake until golden.
Step 5: Let rest before serving.

Step 1: Cook rice and cool.
Step 2: Stir-fry shrimp with garlic.
Step 3: Add vegetables and rice.
Step 4: Season with soy sauce.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella.
Step 2: Arrange alternating slices.
Step 3: Top with fresh basil.
Step 4: Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic.
Step 5: Season with salt and pepper.

Step 1: Sauté onions, garlic, ginger.
Step 2: Add chicken and brown.
Step 3: Add curry powder and tomatoes.
Step 4: Simmer with coconut milk.
Step 5: Garnish with cilantro.

Step 1: Mix flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
Step 2: Whisk in milk, egg, and butter.
Step 3: Cook on griddle until bubbles form.
Step 4: Flip and cook until golden.
Step 5: Serve with syrup and berries.

Step 1: Season salmon with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Grill skin-side down.
Step 3: Flip and cook until flaky.
Step 4: Serve with lemon and dill.
Step 5: Pair with vegetables.

Step 1: Cut tops off peppers and remove seeds.
Step 2: Cook rice with onions and spices.
Step 3: Stuff peppers with rice mixture.
Step 4: Top with cheese and bake.
Step 5: Serve hot.

Step 1: Brown beef chunks.
Step 2: Sauté onion and carrots.
Step 3: Add beef, broth, and potatoes.
Step 4: Simmer until meat is tender.
Step 5: Season with herbs.

Step 1: Cook fettuccine.
Step 2: Sauté chicken and garlic.
Step 3: Make Alfredo sauce with cream and parmesan.
Step 4: Combine pasta and sauce.
Step 5: Garnish with parsley.

Step 1: Mix ground pork with cabbage and garlic.
Step 2: Wrap filling in dumpling wrappers.
Step 3: Pan-fry until crispy.
Step 4: Serve with dipping sauce.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Marinate chicken in yogurt and tandoori spices.
Step 2: Grill or bake until charred.
Step 3: Serve with mint chutney.
Step 4: Garnish with lemon and onion rings.
Step 5: Enjoy with naan.

Step 1: Slice eggplant and salt to remove moisture.
Step 2: Bread and fry slices.
Step 3: Layer with marinara and cheese.
Step 4: Bake until bubbly.
Step 5: Serve with pasta.

Step 1: Slice chicken and marinate.
Step 2: Stir-fry chicken with mushrooms and vegetables.
Step 3: Add broth and thicken.
Step 4: Serve over rice.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Cook pasta.
Step 2: Make pesto with basil, garlic, pine nuts, and olive oil.
Step 3: Toss pasta with pesto.
Step 4: Top with parmesan.
Step 5: Serve with cherry tomatoes.

Step 1: Sauté lobster shells with vegetables.
Step 2: Add broth and simmer.
Step 3: Blend and strain.
Step 4: Stir in cream and sherry.
Step 5: Garnish with lobster meat.

Step 1: Cook chicken and vegetables.
Step 2: Make creamy sauce.
Step 3: Fill pie dish with mixture.
Step 4: Top with puff pastry.
Step 5: Bake until golden.

Step 1: Toast bread slices.
Step 2: Top with tomatoes, garlic, basil.
Step 3: Drizzle with olive oil.
Step 4: Season with salt and pepper.
Step 5: Serve immediately.

Step 1: Sauté onion, celery, bell pepper.
Step 2: Add chicken, sausage, shrimp.
Step 3: Add rice and broth.
Step 4: Season with Cajun spices.
Step 5: Simmer until rice is cooked.

Step 1: Fry french fries.
Step 2: Make gravy.
Step 3: Top fries with cheese curds.
Step 4: Pour hot gravy over.
Step 5: Serve immediately.

Step 1: Marinate chicken in spices and yogurt.
Step 2: Grill or roast until cooked.
Step 3: Slice thinly.
Step 4: Serve in pita with vegetables and tahini.
Step 5: Garnish with parsley.

Step 1: Bring broth to a simmer.
Step 2: Add cornstarch slurry to thicken.
Step 3: Drizzle beaten eggs into broth.
Step 4: Stir gently to form ribbons.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Cook ground beef with spices.
Step 2: Warm tortillas.
Step 3: Fill with beef, rice, beans, and cheese.
Step 4: Roll and tuck.
Step 5: Serve with salsa and guacamole.

Step 1: Make coffee and let cool.
Step 2: Dip ladyfingers in coffee.
Step 3: Layer with mascarpone mixture.
Step 4: Refrigerate overnight.
Step 5: Dust with cocoa powder.

Step 1: Mix crab meat with breadcrumbs and mayo.
Step 2: Form into patties.
Step 3: Pan-fry until golden.
Step 4: Serve with remoulade.
Step 5: Garnish with lemon.

Step 1: Sauté onions, garlic, ginger.
Step 2: Add tomatoes and spices.
Step 3: Add chickpeas and simmer.
Step 4: Garnish with cilantro.
Step 5: Serve with rice or naan.

Step 1: Cook rice and cool.
Step 2: Stir-fry pork with garlic.
Step 3: Add vegetables and rice.
Step 4: Season with soy sauce.
Step 5: Garnish with green onions.

Step 1: Roll out pastry and line tart pan.
Step 2: Cook bacon and onion.
Step 3: Whisk eggs, cream, and cheese.
Step 4: Pour over bacon.
Step 5: Bake until set.

Step 1: Butter bread slices.
Step 2: Place cheese between slices.
Step 3: Grill until golden and cheese melts.
Step 4: Serve with tomato soup.
Step 5: Enjoy.

Step 1: Slice beef and marinate.
Step 2: Stir-fry beef until browned.
Step 3: Add broccoli and sauce.
Step 4: Cook until broccoli is tender.
Step 5: Serve with rice.
